Executive Quant Overview

Crypto Signal Autopsy

Research dashboard for crypto token risk, rejection audits, candidate tracking, and 10x setup analysis.

Research only. No buy/sell signals. No financial advice. Paper candidates are simulated research labels only.

Guided Dashboard Search

Search token symbols, labels, wallet rows, missed winners, or reasons. Blank searches show quick recovery options instead of failing silently.

System Verdict Cards

The scanner is working, but candidate edge is not proven yet.

Tradable Coins

These are research-only candidates that passed stricter liquidity, volume, trap-risk, and survival checks for small-move study. This is not a buy signal.

Tradable Research Candidates

Designed for cautious manual review of possible 5-30% small-move setups. The dashboard never promises a target.

Winner DNA vs Loser DNA

Compares the common shape of winners and losers so filters can improve from evidence.

Delayed Entry Simulator

Tests whether waiting 15m, 30m, or 1h still worked before later horizons.

Early Winner Survival Lab

This is the new winner-vs-loser research engine. It studies whether early momentum survived after detection instead of pretending a pump is automatically safe.

Survival Pattern Engine

Pump strength, trap risk, and survival are research scores only. They are not buy or sell signals.

Rules To Test Next

The app turns failures and missed winners into specific filter experiments.

Category Performance Cards

Each category shows sample size, median return, best/worst outcome, positive rate, and audit verdict.

Outcome Charts

Median and average are both shown because averages can be distorted by outliers.

Outcome Curve By Horizon

Category Positive Rate

10x Score vs Future Return

Failure Diagnosis Donut

Accepted Failure Lab

Paper candidates are simulated research labels only. Current accepted/paper results are weak until proven by larger samples.

10x Score Failure Review

High 10x score failures must be visible, not hidden.

Missed Winner Lab

Some rejected tokens pumped hard. This does not automatically mean the filter was wrong. The system must check whether those tokens were actually tradable or only high-risk momentum.

High-Risk Momentum Lab

High-risk momentum. Studied because similar rejected tokens sometimes pumped. Not a buy signal.

Baseline Comparison

No strategy proves edge unless candidates beat BTC, ETH, all-scanned, and similar-token baselines.

Wallet Intelligence Status

10x Candidate Engine

Wallet Memory / Reputation

Free wallet memory ranks wallets already seen around scanned tokens. It is not copy trading.

Data Quality Panel

Short-horizon results may be approximate because GitHub Actions runs roughly hourly.

Raw Tables / Exports

All data is generated before deployment. The public dashboard does not call crypto APIs from the browser.
